cards.front: What is the basic architecture of an adder in combinational logic?
cards.back: A series of full adders connected together to perform binary addition

cards.front: What is the purpose of the carry-in (CIN) in an adder?
cards.back: To provide the carry from the most significant bit to the next bit in the adder

cards.front: What is the output of a full adder in an adder?
cards.back: The sum bit (S) and the carry-out bit (CO)

cards.front: What is the term for the process of generating the carry-out bits in an adder?
What is the term for the number of inputs required for a full adder in an adder?
